summary.intent: Ensure the PRD accurately reflects all implemented sprint 1 features so it can serve as the master document for tracking future sprints.
summary.outcome: PRD updated with correct state management architecture (nanostores atoms), a new Known Technical Debt section, and sprint-status.yaml updated to mark stories 2.2/2.3/2.4 as done.

repo: Project uses nanostores with 4 shared atoms (priceStore, statusStore, marketStore, chartStore) as a cross-island global state layer — not component-local state as the PRD originally claimed.
Data flow is: ConnectionManager/MarketDataService → nanostores atoms → island components, not WebSocket → island component → DOM.
Deferred technical debt is tracked in _bmad-output/implementation-artifacts/deferred-work.md with ~12 acknowledged items.
Sprint artifacts live under _bmad-output/ split between planning-artifacts/ and implementation-artifacts/.

code.finding: State management section was out of sync with implementation — described component-local state but nanostores global atoms were actually built.
Stories 2.2, 2.3, 2.4 were left in 'review' status despite the sprint being considered complete.

workflow: PRD accuracy should be verified against story files and deferred-work.md at sprint end before promoting it to master planning doc.
Sprint status files need manual updates when stories transition to done — they do not self-update.

friction: PRD technical architecture section diverged significantly from what was built (nanostores vs. no global state), requiring correction before the document could be trusted.
Sprint status yaml was stale — stories marked 'review' instead of 'done' despite sprint being complete.
open_items: ~12 deferred technical debt items tracked in deferred-work.md — none addressed this sprint, referenced in new PRD Known Technical Debt section.
Phase 2 and Phase 3 of the PRD are defined and ready for sprint planning.
Full detail on deferred items available in _bmad-output/implementation-artifacts/deferred-work.md for next sprint grooming.
